message.content:
Explore the codebase to understand how the network abstraction layer works and how deposits are implemented. I need to understand:

1. How networks (TRON, Ethereum) are abstracted — look at src/modules/networks/
2. How deposits work — look at src/modules/deposit/ (initiation, monitoring, completion, pool accounts)
3. How pool accounts are managed
4. What would need to change to add BNB (BSC) support

Focus on:
- Network interface/abstract class that each chain implements
- How deposit monitoring jobs work (the repeatable BullMQ jobs)
- How pool account sweep/top-up works
- Any hardcoded network references (TRON, ETH) that would need BNB added
- Database entities related to networks, deposits, pool accounts
- Configuration for networks (RPC endpoints, etc.)

Be very thorough — check configs, entities, enums, constants, and the networks module structure.
